zh.lifeSummary: 當Basilla de Drakelow於1130年出生在英國德比夏爾時，她的父親Gamel Drakelowe36歲，母親Synadene de Botaneiata30歲。她於大約1150年與Robert de Gresley在英國德比夏爾德拉可洛福結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1183年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾伯頓 武朋 特倫特享年53歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Basilla de Drakelow于1130年出生在英国德比夏爾时，她的父亲Gamel Drakelowe36岁，母亲Synadene de Botaneiata30岁。她于大约1150年与Robert de Gresley在英国德比夏爾德拉可洛福结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1183年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾伯頓 武朋 特倫特享年53岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾。

nameMeanings.name: Basilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Casilla, from a diminutive of casa ‘house’ (see Casa ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Basilla de Drakelow was born in 1130, in Derbyshire, England, her father, Gamel Drakelowe, was 36 and her mother, Synadene de Botaneiata, was 30. She married Robert de Gresley about 1150, in Drakelowe, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1183, in Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Basilla de Drakelow est née en 1130, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Gamel Drakelowe, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Synadene de Botaneiata, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Gresley environ 1150, à Drakelowe, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1183, à Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.Burton on Trent St Modwen, Staffordshire: Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Basilla de Drakelow 1130 in Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gamel Drakelowe 36 und ihre Mutter Synadene de Botaneiata 30. Sie hat um 1150 in Drakelowe, Derbyshire, England Robert de Gresley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1183 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Derbyshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Robert de Gresley circa 1150, nel Drakelowe, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Basilla de Drakelowが1130年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gamel Drakeloweは36歳，母Synadene de Botaneiataは30歳であった。約1150年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアドラケロウでRobert de Gresleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1183年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブルトン ウプオン トレントで53歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.Burton on Trent St Modwen, Staffordshire: 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 버턴 업 트렌트
ko.lifeSummary: Basilla de Drakelow(이)가 1130년 영국 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gamel Drakelowe(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Synadene de Botaneiata(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1150년 영국 더비실르 드라켈로에서 Robert de Gresley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1183년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 버턴 업 트렌트에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Basilla de Drakelow nasceu em 1130, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gamel Drakelowe, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Synadene de Botaneiata, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Gresley aproximadamente 1150, em Drakelowe, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1183, em Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Burton on Trent St Modwen, Staffordshire: буртон упон трент, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Basilla de Drakelow родилась в 1130 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Gamel Drakelowe было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Synadene de Botaneiata, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Gresley около 1150 г. в местности дрекелоу, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1183 г. в местности буртон упон трент, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности дирбишир, Англия.
